projects.title: Building a B2B Growth Engine from Scratch
projects.industry: Software development / AI services, United States
projects.oneLineResult: Built an entire B2B growth engine from scratch and held $149.5K in open pipeline
projects.problem: When I joined, Techling relied on untrained sales reps and inconsistent Upwork leads, with little outbound success and no clear positioning.
projects.solution: I built the growth engine end to end: defined mission, vision, USP, and ICPs (healthcare, edtech, mobility AI), repositioned the company, rebuilt the website, grew the CEO's personal brand, launched the Techling Healthcare sub-brand, set up cold email and LinkedIn outreach, and implemented HubSpot CRM.
projects.result: The redesign generated 10 to 15 qualified leads in the first month, the founder brand reached 1.4M impressions, and the pipeline held $149.5K in open deal value across 17 active leads, with multiple five-figure deals closed.

testimonial.quote: Working with Ahmer at Techling has been an exceptional experience. As our Head of Growth, he played a crucial role in building our entire digital and marketing infrastructure from the ground up. He built and scaled our marketing channels across content, email, and paid media, and set up robust outbound systems that allowed us to consistently reach and convert high-quality leads.

projects.title: Growing a Founder's LinkedIn to 8,000 Followers
projects.industry: Software development / AI services, United States
projects.oneLineResult: Grew a founder's LinkedIn from near zero to 8,000 targeted followers and 1.4M impressions
projects.problem: To position Techling as a thought leader in AI and software, the CEO needed a targeted audience and real engagement with decision-makers, starting from almost nothing.
projects.solution: I cleaned his connections to match the ICP, built a content calendar and posted daily across formats (stories, insights, carousels, case studies), iterated using data, and engaged strategically with influencers and ICP accounts.
projects.result: Grew the profile from near zero to 8,000 targeted followers in 12 months, with 1.4M total impressions, 14,000+ engagements, and some posts passing 750,000 impressions.

testimonial.quote: Working with Ahmer at Techling has been an exceptional experience. As our Head of Growth, he played a crucial role in building our entire digital and marketing infrastructure from the ground up. He built and scaled our marketing channels across content, email, and paid media, and set up robust outbound systems that allowed us to consistently reach and convert high-quality leads.

projects.title: A Multi Six-Figure Pipeline in Three Months
projects.oneLineResult: Built a multi six-figure sales pipeline in three months through cold email
projects.problem: Logeix needed a robust sales pipeline built through cold email, with deliverability as the central challenge in a landscape of strict spam filters.
projects.solution: I ran targeted cold email campaigns for their e-commerce ICP, researched market pain points to tailor messaging to Logeix's value proposition, maintained a clean prospect database, and tracked the pipeline in a CRM.
projects.result: Built a multi six-figure pipeline in three months with up to 70% open and 10% response rates, bringing in high-value clients and surpassing targets.

testimonial.quote: Ahmer knows his stuff when it comes to cold emailing. We signed multiple clients while working together and fully delegated the work to him with minimal communication needed.

projects.title: A Six-Figure Pipeline for a Local SEO Agency
projects.oneLineResult: Built a six-figure pipeline and signed 10+ clients for a local SEO agency through cold email
projects.problem: Syntech needed a reliable way to generate qualified leads and book meetings to grow its client base.
projects.solution: I set up the email infrastructure and records for deliverability, cleaned and segmented lead lists to prequalified prospects, loaded campaigns into automation tools, wrote the copy, and managed replies and follow-ups.
projects.result: Campaigns hit up to 70% open and 5% response rates with 15 to 25% positive replies, built a six-figure pipeline, and signed 10+ clients in six months.

projects.title: 5x Organic Traffic for a US Watch-Band Store
projects.oneLineResult: Grew organic traffic 5x and doubled organic keywords for a US watch-band store that relied entirely on paid ads
projects.problem: Hadley made good sales but every sale came from a single paid channel (Facebook Ads). They had almost no non-branded keywords ranking and very little organic traffic, leaving a large amount of potential untapped.
projects.solution: I audited the site (no prior SEO foundation existed), ran competitor and keyword research, then handled on-page work: keyword mapping, structure changes, meta and heading optimization, image alt tags, and content for thin category pages. I also fixed coverage issues, added a sitemap and schema, and managed the crawl budget.
projects.result: The store built an organic search presence for the first time, grew traffic 5x and keywords 2x, and reduced its dependence on paid ads.

projects.title: Recovering a Real Estate Site from a Google Penalty
projects.industry: Real estate / property management, United States
projects.oneLineResult: Recovered a real estate site from a Google penalty and restored 400% of its organic traffic
projects.problem: MPM had lost up to 60% of its keyword base, with organic traffic on a continuous decline. The previous local SEO agency could not identify the cause, and the site kept losing rankings.
projects.solution: I diagnosed the drop as a hit from Google's December 2021 update, confirmed there was no manual penalty in Search Console, then ran a content audit (the update targeted content) and fixed the major content issues driving the decline.
projects.result: The site recovered from the update, regained 120% in organic keywords and 400% in organic traffic, and got de-indexed pages indexed again.

projects.title: Organic SEO Growth for a Craft Superstore
projects.oneLineResult: Grew organic traffic 40% and doubled organic keywords for Australia's largest online craft store
projects.problem: Craft Online was investing heavily in SEO with a previous agency but had a narrow keyword base, low organic traffic, and weak visibility. Their previous agency used outdated tactics and gave poor reporting, so they were not getting the ROI they expected.
projects.solution: I ran a full SEO audit and competitor analysis, then mapped keywords to every page, rebuilt meta tags and URL structures, fixed heading and image tags, and added content to thin pages. On the technical side I fixed coverage and crawl issues, optimized internal linking, added schema, and improved Core Web Vitals.
projects.result: Organic traffic and keyword rankings grew significantly, letting the client diversify their sales channels and reduce reliance on paid ads. Search visibility improved across the store.

projects.title: Building an Organic Channel from Scratch with Programmatic SEO
projects.industry: Software development / AI services, United States
projects.oneLineResult: Took organic impressions from near zero to 60,000+ by building an SEO channel from scratch
projects.problem: Techling ran on an outdated website with generic, borrowed content and relied on outbound alone. There was no organic acquisition channel and little search visibility.
projects.solution: After launching a new brand-aligned site, I fixed technical issues (speed, broken links, crawlability), set up local listings and Google Business Profiles across target US markets, and used programmatic SEO to generate pages for niche AI-related and local keywords.
projects.result: Organic impressions grew from near zero to 60,000+ with 700+ clicks, mostly from priority markets (US, UAE, Saudi Arabia), ranking for branded and non-branded terms.

testimonial.quote: Working with Ahmer at Techling has been an exceptional experience. As our Head of Growth, he played a crucial role in building our entire digital and marketing infrastructure from the ground up. He built and scaled our marketing channels across content, email, and paid media, and set up robust outbound systems that allowed us to consistently reach and convert high-quality leads.

projects.title: Cold Outbound Built from Scratch for a UK SEO Agency
projects.oneLineResult: Built a cold outbound engine from scratch that delivered a steady stream of qualified leads
projects.problem: Arken, an SEO agency for budget-conscious SMBs, needed to reach local UK businesses and book meetings to support sales growth, with no outbound system in place.
projects.solution: I built the outbound system end to end: set up email accounts and DNS records (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), built and segmented ICP lead lists, wrote personalized sequences, monitored inbox placement, and handled responses and handoffs.
projects.result: Campaigns achieved 5 to 7% response and 15 to 25% positive reply rates (around 1 positive reply per 80 emails), creating a scalable, repeatable system that produced steady qualified leads.

projects.title: Cold Email for an Australian E-commerce Agency
projects.oneLineResult: Built a predictable cold email pipeline for an Australian e-commerce agency, with up to 70% open rates
projects.problem: Plus Social needed to connect with Australian e-commerce businesses and book meetings to fuel its sales pipeline, with no outbound system set up.
projects.solution: I built the cold outreach system from the ground up: email accounts and DNS records (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) for deliverability, cleaned and segmented lead lists, personalized copy, deliverability monitoring, and reply management.
projects.result: Campaigns reached up to 70% open, 5% response, and 15 to 25% positive reply rates, establishing a predictable and scalable outbound channel.

projects.title: Booking Meetings for a UGC Marketing Agency
projects.industry: UGC / TikTok marketing agency, United States
projects.oneLineResult: Booked 20+ meetings in a month for a UGC and TikTok marketing agency
projects.problem: Viral Fire needed qualified meetings booked through outbound to grow its client base.
projects.solution: I set up cold outreach across cold email, LinkedIn, and Twitter, built ICPs by niche, and ran the campaigns and infrastructure from scratch.
projects.result: Booked 20+ meetings in a month, generating around $33K in pipeline.

projects.title: A Cold Email Engine for an AI Software Company
projects.industry: Software development / AI services, United States
projects.oneLineResult: Generated 24 qualified leads worth $30K in ACV from a cold email channel built from scratch
projects.problem: Techling relied on passive Upwork leads and had no outbound channel, limiting its ability to reach high-value clients in niche AI markets.
projects.solution: I set up the email infrastructure (domains, DNS, warm-up), built workflows in Smartlead integrated with Apollo and enrichment tools, scraped and verified leads (Reoon, Voila Norbert, BounceBan, LeadMagic), and A/B tested industry-specific offers.
projects.result: The channel hit a 5% reply rate with 7% positive replies and under 2% bounce, generating 24 qualified leads worth around $30K ACV and reducing dependence on Upwork.

projects.title: 50+ Meetings from Founder-Led LinkedIn Outreach
projects.industry: Software development / AI services, United States
projects.oneLineResult: Held 50+ qualified meetings through founder-led LinkedIn outreach at a 27% reply rate
projects.problem: Techling needed qualified, high-ticket AI and ML deals across EdTech, SaaS, retail, and healthcare, without relying on paid ads.
projects.solution: I designed and ran LinkedIn outreach from the CEO's profile, sourced high-intent leads via Sales Navigator and engagement data, automated outreach with HeyReach while keeping personalization, and aligned it with the content strategy.
projects.result: Reached 2,000+ qualified leads with a 30% connection acceptance rate and 27% reply rate, held 50+ qualified meetings, and closed multiple five-figure deals.

testimonial.quote: Working with Ahmer at Techling has been an exceptional experience. As our Head of Growth, he played a crucial role in building our entire digital and marketing infrastructure from the ground up. He built and scaled our marketing channels across content, email, and paid media, and set up robust outbound systems that allowed us to consistently reach and convert high-quality leads.

projects.title: Launching a Healthcare Sub-Brand on LinkedIn
projects.oneLineResult: Launched a healthcare sub-brand and drove 10+ qualified leads through a new director's LinkedIn
projects.problem: To build credibility in healthcare AI, Techling needed a dedicated brand and a director's profile that could attract healthcare founders, CTOs, and innovation leads from scratch.
projects.solution: I created the brand identity and content voice, built a LinkedIn content strategy for healthcare decision-makers, posted consistent thought leadership, and directed engagement with the ICP and relevant creators.
projects.result: Built the director's profile from 0 to 866 followers in 90 days, with 35,000+ impressions, 1,400+ engagements, 1,200+ profile viewers, and 10+ qualified healthcare leads.

testimonial.quote: What sets Ahmer apart is not just his expertise, but his work ethic and dedication. He's proactive, detail-oriented, and deeply committed to delivering results.

projects.title: 830% ROAS in Two Weeks for a Hobby Store
projects.oneLineResult: Activated a dormant Google Ads channel and hit 830% ROAS with $33.6K revenue in the first two weeks
projects.problem: The client was a 45-year-old brick-and-mortar hobby store that had to pivot online in 2020. Their Google Ads channel had been set up but never properly activated. They had a limited $3,000/month budget and needed fast, measurable returns from their digital spend.
projects.solution: I analysed the business model and built a campaign strategy that prioritised fast ROI within the budget constraints. I activated the dormant channel, set up and structured campaigns end to end, then managed performance and scaled spend as results came in.
projects.result: The campaigns hit 830% ROAS and generated $33.6K in revenue in the first two weeks, with an $11 CPA. The channel became a consistent cash-flow driver and the budget was scaled up based on early performance.

projects.title: Halving CPA and Adding $19K Monthly Revenue
projects.oneLineResult: Restructured a failing Google Ads account to cut CPA from $28 to $12 and add $19K in monthly revenue at the same ad spend
projects.problem: The client was an established online supplement store that had tried multiple agencies but could not get their SEM campaigns to perform. Despite ongoing spend, CPA was high and revenue from paid search was underwhelming.
projects.solution: I ran a deep performance analysis of the existing account, identified flawed campaign settings and structural issues, then restructured and optimised the campaigns, iterating on bids, keywords, negative lists, and ad copy over three months.
projects.result: ROAS improved to 1:22, CPA dropped from $28 to $12, and monthly revenue increased by $19K at the same ad spend. The business reached the half-million-dollar revenue mark during this period.

projects.title: AI-Powered Prospecting and Outreach at Scale
projects.industry: Software development / AI services, United States
projects.oneLineResult: Used Clay, Apify, and Smartlead to build an AI-augmented outbound engine that generated 24 qualified leads worth $30K ACV
projects.problem: Techling needed to reach high-value clients in niche AI markets but had no scalable way to find, enrich, and contact qualified prospects without relying on manual research or passive Upwork leads.
projects.solution: Used Clay to pull and enrich prospect data by scraping company signals and intent data across target verticals. Used Apify to build prospect lists from public sources at scale. Fed verified leads into Smartlead for A/B tested sequences by industry vertical.
projects.result: Achieved 5% reply rate, 7% positive replies, and under 2% bounce rate. Generated 24 qualified leads worth around $30K ACV and eliminated dependence on passive Upwork leads.

testimonial.quote: Working with Ahmer at Techling has been an exceptional experience. As our Head of Growth, he played a crucial role in building our entire digital and marketing infrastructure from the ground up.

aiExamples.what: Used Clay to pull and enrich prospect data for Techling's cold email campaigns, scraping company signals and intent data to write personalised outreach angles at scale. Combined with A/B testing in Smartlead across industry verticals (healthcare, edtech, mobility AI).
aiExamples.outcome: 5% reply rate, 7% positive replies, under 2% bounce. Generated 24 qualified leads worth around $30K ACV.

aiExamples.what: Used Apify to scrape public data sources and build prospect lists for outbound campaigns, extracting structured data that would have taken hours to compile manually.
aiExamples.outcome: Faster list building at higher volume with cleaner data feeding into enrichment and verification workflows.

recognition.text: GTM Engineer, Cohort 4, GTM Engineer School.

whoIAm.bio: A tech guy turned marketer, fascinated by what actually moves people to decide. It started in a 2019 semester break, learning SEO through a friend's recommendation and a stack of Coursera courses. When COVID hit, Digital Marketer opened its paid courses free for two weeks, I put in 16-hour days and got through as much as I could. That led into lead generation and cold email, chasing the idea of running my own agency. Two failed attempts later, I realized the real asset wasn't any single skill, it was the range. Today, with AI and LLMs in the mix, that range has turned into being a T-shaped technical marketer.

homepageTestimonials.quote: Working with Ahmer at Techling has been an exceptional experience. As our Head of Growth, he played a crucial role in building our entire digital and marketing infrastructure from the ground up. He built and scaled our marketing channels across content, email, and paid media, and set up robust outbound systems that allowed us to consistently reach and convert high-quality leads.
Ahmer knows his stuff when it comes to cold emailing. We signed multiple clients while working together and fully delegated the work to him with minimal communication needed.
What sets Ahmer apart is not just his expertise, but his work ethic and dedication. He's proactive, detail-oriented, and deeply committed to delivering results.
